question: Explain how Newton's first law relates to inertia with an example.
text: So, like, because an object of motion stays in motion, you will, like, you need, like, let's say, like, you're driving a car, right, and you're going 60 miles per hour, you're also going 60 miles per hour as a human passenger in that car, but, like, let's say, like, you stop, like, abruptly, you're still going to go 60 miles per hour because of inertia.

question: Describe your typical morning routine.
text: Basically like every morning I just wake up, shower, brush my teeth, put on my contacts and just get on my computer.
